title: selaginella substipitata
intro: Selaginella substipitata, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella substipitata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or decoction, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
